description: tested regex vs coordinate-based table extraction on BERT PDF
result: coordinate-based overcounts, LaTeX source is correct

description: LaTeX source parsing vs PDF extraction for table detection
hypothesis: LaTeX gives more accurate table counts
result: Yes: LoRA 11→145, ResNet 130→949

description: pymupdf find_tables vs text-based fallback extraction
result: find_tables misses complex tables entirely on many papers

description: ML metric vocabulary matching vs simple numeric column counting
result: vocabulary catches headers like Acc, F1, BLEU; numeric counting returns 0 on some tables

description: Coordinate-based column detection vs regex row detection
result: Coordinates overcounted on BERT (73 tables from body text); needs numeric content filter

description: Table region segmentation (between Table N captions) vs whole-text parsing
result: Helps when tables are embedded in dense text

description: Concatenating all .tex files vs main file only for arXiv source
result: BERT: 0 tables (main only) vs 8 tables (all files). Tables often in separate .tex files

description: tabular vs tabular* vs tabularx regex pattern matching
result: BERT uses tabular* with {textwidth} width arg that broke initial pattern

description: OpenAlex: searched "bonferroni" vs "multiple comparison" vs "FWER" in ML papers
result: Low correction rates across all search terms

description: OpenAlex: fulltext.search for statistical testing terms across 250M papers
result: Found correction rates by field

description: OpenAlex: compared ML correction rates vs biology/medicine/psychology
result: Confirmed: ML has lowest correction rate of any field

description: Citation network: traced citation patterns of corrected vs uncorrected papers
result: Analyzed whether correction practices propagate through citations

description: Benchmark lifespan: tracked saturation curves of major benchmarks
result: Measured time from introduction to near-ceiling performance

description: ICLR 2024 peer reviews: demand-compliance pipeline analysis
result: Reviewers demand more comparisons, authors comply, scores rise

description: Peer review: reviewer demands vs author compliance vs score change
result: Found positive correlation: more comparisons added = higher score bump

description: arXiv version diffs: 2022-2023 cs.* papers revision patterns
result: Script runs but killed due to 13min runtime from 3s rate limit

description: Compared PDF-only vs LaTeX-source audit accuracy on LoRA
result: PDF: m=11, LaTeX: m=143. 13x improvement

description: Compared PDF-only vs LaTeX-source audit accuracy on BERT
result: PDF: m=4887 (overcounted), LaTeX: m=414. PDF coordinate detection caught body text

description: Compared PDF-only vs LaTeX-source audit accuracy on ResNet
result: PDF: m=130, LaTeX: m=949. LaTeX found 11 tables vs PDF few

description: Updated FWER audit table: PDF-only vs LaTeX-source counts for 4 papers
result: Median FWER rose from 0.45 to 0.91 with LaTeX source parsing
